name: Manticore

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the marilith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The marilith has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reactive
traits.text: The marilith can take one Reaction on every turn of combat.

text:
# Manticore

*Large Fiend (Demon), Chaotic Evil*

### Actions

**Pact Blade.** Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

**Constrict.** Strength Saving Throw: DC 17, one Medium or smaller creature the marilith can see within 5 feet. Failure: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.
